description: Los Pelones is an enforcer gang originally part of the Sinaloa Cartel, founded in 2004 in Guerrero, Mexico. It distributed narcotics in tourist spots and later became independent after the Beltrán-Leyva split. The group allied with the Gulf Cartel in 2012 and later became independent again due to fragmentation. It is involved in drug trafficking, murder, and extortion.
